item.title: WBPD – Promods RC v1.6 1.59 ETS2
item.description:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | May 20, 2026

WBPD – Promods RC v1.6 1.59 ETS2

Changelog 1.6
Compatibility with ETS2 version 1.59 and Promods 2.82
Changed mod name to WBPD – Promods RC

Description:
Fixes issues between Promods and WBPD (West Balkans Path-Breaker’s Direction) Map by Septian_MR following the re-adding of Subotica.

Credits: Foryst

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD
item.content:encoded:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | May 20, 2026

WBPD – Promods RC v1.6 1.59 ETS2

Changelog 1.6
Compatibility with ETS2 version 1.59 and Promods 2.82
Changed mod name to WBPD – Promods RC

Description:
Fixes issues between Promods and WBPD (West Balkans Path-Breaker’s Direction) Map by Septian_MR following the re-adding of Subotica.

Credits: Foryst

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD

item.title: Urban Traffic Overhaul v24.2 1.59 ATS
item.description:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | May 20, 2026

Urban Traffic Overhaul v24.2 1.59 ATS

Changelog
Emergency hotfix (v24.2)
Broken companies in East St. Louis have been fixed.
Typos for Tucker Boulevard in East St. Louis and St. Louis have been fixed.
The start of rush hour changed from 5 AM to 6 AM.

v24.1
Illinois DLC implementation.
Unrealistic frequency of Hummers in AI traffic fixed.

Maintenance update for 1.59 available (v24). I don’t think v23.1 crashes 1.59, but the introduced map errors have been pruned and whatever small cumulative tweaks made to the map and settings since then are now public.
Running v23.1 with Illinois enabled probably results in broken sectors near St. Louis, too, as those have been edited and in v23.1 are in the same state as they were when Missouri released.

This mod greatly increases traffic density in major urban areas across the map; traffic elsewhere is kept to vanilla levels, which I think is realistic enough. It also widens freeways and urbanizes some areas that are particularly inaccurate in the original map. Use the available “Lite” version if you want only the scenery/signage changes in California and Phoenix Area.
(For compatibility with traffic spawn mods, simply open the mod with a file archiver (7-Zip, WinRAR, …), open the “def” folder and delete “traffic_data.sii” and “traffic_rules_spawn.sui” inside its “world” folder)

All map DLC required
Compatible: 1.59.x

Credits: Quaristice

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD
item.content:encoded:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | May 20, 2026

Urban Traffic Overhaul v24.2 1.59 ATS

Changelog
Emergency hotfix (v24.2)
Broken companies in East St. Louis have been fixed.
Typos for Tucker Boulevard in East St. Louis and St. Louis have been fixed.
The start of rush hour changed from 5 AM to 6 AM.

v24.1
Illinois DLC implementation.
Unrealistic frequency of Hummers in AI traffic fixed.

Maintenance update for 1.59 available (v24). I don’t think v23.1 crashes 1.59, but the introduced map errors have been pruned and whatever small cumulative tweaks made to the map and settings since then are now public.
Running v23.1 with Illinois enabled probably results in broken sectors near St. Louis, too, as those have been edited and in v23.1 are in the same state as they were when Missouri released.

This mod greatly increases traffic density in major urban areas across the map; traffic elsewhere is kept to vanilla levels, which I think is realistic enough. It also widens freeways and urbanizes some areas that are particularly inaccurate in the original map. Use the available “Lite” version if you want only the scenery/signage changes in California and Phoenix Area.
(For compatibility with traffic spawn mods, simply open the mod with a file archiver (7-Zip, WinRAR, …), open the “def” folder and delete “traffic_data.sii” and “traffic_rules_spawn.sui” inside its “world” folder)

All map DLC required
Compatible: 1.59.x

Credits: Quaristice

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD

item.title: WBPD (West Balkans Path-Breaker’s Direction) Map v5.5 1.59 ETS2
item.description:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | May 20, 2026

WBPD (West Balkans Path-Breaker’s Direction) Map v5.5 1.59 ETS2

WBPD Map v5.5:
Compatibility update for ETS2 1.59 game version
Added a new explored city: Požega (Croatia).
Added several new roads: D51 & D53 from Našice to Požega (Croatia)
Several bug fixes from the previous map version & minor improvements.

LIST OF MAP CONTENTS (updated to v5.5):
a) Croatia
New explorable cities: Slavonski Brod, Vukovar, and Požega (NEW)
New scenery town: Županja and Našice
Reworked A3 (E70) motorway section from Slavonski Brod to Županja
Fully reworked “Slavonika” A5 (E73) motorway, connecting the Hungarian border to the Bosnian border crossing (Donji Svilaj), including the “3rd Guards Brigade Kune Bridge” over the Drava River
Major rework in Osijek, including: Industrijska Četvrt area with a new MAN truck dealer, Explorable river port of Luka Osijek, and Reworked factory in Nemetin
Numerous secret roads around Osijek Airport
New regional roads added: D55 from Vukovar to Županja, D53 around Slavonski Brod + a small section from Požega toNašice, extended D2 from Osijek to Našice, and D51 around Požega

b) Bosnia & Herzegovina
New explorable city: Doboj and Gradiška
New scenery towns: (Bosanski) Brod, Matuzići (south of Doboj), Modriča, (Bosanski) Šamac, Orašje, and Cerik (part of Brčko District)
Reworked an (existing) scenery town: Lukavac
Fully reworked “9. Januar” Motorway from Doboj to Banja Luka
New roads added: M14.1 and M17 connecting Doboj, Kladari (motorway exit), (Bosanski) Brod, Modriča, and (Bosanski) Šamac, R462a from (Bosanski) Šamac to Lončari junction, M4 from Matuzići directly to Banja Luka, and M1.8 from Orašje directly to Šićki Brod junction near Tuzla
Reworked Liješnica paper factory (SCS_Paper) and its surroundings

REQUIREMENTS
ETS2 1.59 (and above).
Only a map DLC: West Balkans
(For example: if you have ‘West Balkans DLC’ but don’t have ‘Iberia DLC’, you can still play this map. Of course, you can play this map with all the DLCs. It is also compatible with the Greece DLC and the Nordic Horizon DLC.

Credits: Septian_MR

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD
item.content:encoded:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | May 20, 2026

WBPD (West Balkans Path-Breaker’s Direction) Map v5.5 1.59 ETS2

WBPD Map v5.5:
Compatibility update for ETS2 1.59 game version
Added a new explored city: Požega (Croatia).
Added several new roads: D51 & D53 from Našice to Požega (Croatia)
Several bug fixes from the previous map version & minor improvements.

LIST OF MAP CONTENTS (updated to v5.5):
a) Croatia
New explorable cities: Slavonski Brod, Vukovar, and Požega (NEW)
New scenery town: Županja and Našice
Reworked A3 (E70) motorway section from Slavonski Brod to Županja
Fully reworked “Slavonika” A5 (E73) motorway, connecting the Hungarian border to the Bosnian border crossing (Donji Svilaj), including the “3rd Guards Brigade Kune Bridge” over the Drava River
Major rework in Osijek, including: Industrijska Četvrt area with a new MAN truck dealer, Explorable river port of Luka Osijek, and Reworked factory in Nemetin
Numerous secret roads around Osijek Airport
New regional roads added: D55 from Vukovar to Županja, D53 around Slavonski Brod + a small section from Požega toNašice, extended D2 from Osijek to Našice, and D51 around Požega

b) Bosnia & Herzegovina
New explorable city: Doboj and Gradiška
New scenery towns: (Bosanski) Brod, Matuzići (south of Doboj), Modriča, (Bosanski) Šamac, Orašje, and Cerik (part of Brčko District)
Reworked an (existing) scenery town: Lukavac
Fully reworked “9. Januar” Motorway from Doboj to Banja Luka
New roads added: M14.1 and M17 connecting Doboj, Kladari (motorway exit), (Bosanski) Brod, Modriča, and (Bosanski) Šamac, R462a from (Bosanski) Šamac to Lončari junction, M4 from Matuzići directly to Banja Luka, and M1.8 from Orašje directly to Šićki Brod junction near Tuzla
Reworked Liješnica paper factory (SCS_Paper) and its surroundings

REQUIREMENTS
ETS2 1.59 (and above).
Only a map DLC: West Balkans
(For example: if you have ‘West Balkans DLC’ but don’t have ‘Iberia DLC’, you can still play this map. Of course, you can play this map with all the DLCs. It is also compatible with the Greece DLC and the Nordic Horizon DLC.

Credits: Septian_MR

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD

item.title: BXP PM Atlantic 159.0 ETS2
item.description:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | May 20, 2026

BXP PM Atlantic 159.0 ETS2

BXP PM Atlantic 159.0
ProMods map add-on of Ireland, Northern Ireland, Greenland, Faroes, Scotland, Isle of Man, United Kingdom (entire London circle) and Norway
CONTAINS: Tuam, Gort, Cork, Ringaskiddy, Swinford, Ballaghaderreen, Swords, Monorhamilton, Rosses Point, Castlebar, Ballindine, Mooncoin, New Ross, Moorfields, Whitehead, Carrickfergus, Ballynure, Ballyclare, Dungiven, Magherafelt, Templepatrick, Crumlin, Sørvágur, Sandavágur, Oyrarbakki, Oyndarfjørður, Runavik, Tarbert, Aird a’ Mhulaidh, Stormness, Deerness, Machrins, Kilchattan, Kiloran, Scalasaig, Boisdale, Daliburgh, Ardemore, Baymore, Clachan, a Luib, Sollas, Lochmaddy, Grutness, Lerwick, Sandness, Brae, Toft, Ulsta, Mid Yell, Gloup, Gutcher, Skopun, Sandvík, Hvalba, Húsavík, Trongisvágur, Froðba, Porkeri, Vágur, Lopra, Sumba, Nanortalik, Tasiusaq, Tasiilaq, Kulusuk, Kuummiit, Ittoqqortoormiit, Olonkinbyen, Puppebu, Hornsund, Ny-Ålesund, Bjørnøya, Croydon, Richmond, Lifford, Strabane, Ballygawley, Omagh, Enniskillen, Dungannon and Warrenpoint

FEATURES:
expanded Galway, Sligo, Limerick, Kilkenny, Waterford, Wexford, Dublin, Larne, Ballymena, Lisburn, Antrim, Klaksvík, Tórshavn, Stornoway,
Kirkwall, Ramsey, Douglas, Lochboisdale, Balivanich, Nuuk, London, Newry and Londonderry

COMPLETED: various roads and improvements
INCOMPLETE: nothing reported
DEPENDENCY: ProMods
SPECIAL THANKS: SCS, ProMods, mrmonkey1990, duckie, notreal71 and hi sora

Credits: BXP

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD

BXP PM Atlantic 159.0 ETS2

ProMods map add-on of Ireland, Northern Ireland, Greenland, Faroes, Scotland, Isle of Man, United Kingdom (entire London circle) and Norway

FEATURES:
expanded Galway, Sligo, Limerick, Kilkenny, Waterford, Wexford, Dublin, Larne, Ballymena, Lisburn, Antrim, Klaksvík, Tórshavn, Stornoway,
Kirkwall, Ramsey, Douglas, Lochboisdale, Balivanich, Nuuk, London, Newry and Londonderry

COMPLETED: various roads and improvements
INCOMPLETE: nothing reported
DEPENDENCY: ProMods
SPECIAL THANKS: SCS, ProMods, mrmonkey1990, duckie, notreal71 and hi sora

Credits: BXP

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD

item.title: BXP PM Baltic 159.0 ETS2
item.description:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | May 20, 2026

BXP PM Baltic 159.0 ETS2

BXP PM Baltic 159.0
ProMods map add-on of Deutschland, Russia (Kaliningrad Oblast), Lithuania and Estonia
CONTAINS: Bad Segeberg, Landkirchen, Lübeck, Dassow, Roggentin, Oyten, Munster, Eimke, Lüchow, Dannenberg, Emden, Melsdorf, Puttgarden, Dömitz, Neuhaus, List, Westerland, Hörnum, Rybachii, Sovetsk (Tilzi), Neman, Ulyanovo, Novokolkhoznoe, Bolshakovo, Pushkarevo, Chernyakhovsk, Panemunė, Pagėgiai, Šilutė, Jõhvi, Kalmaküla, Rajaküla, Imavere, Adavere, Kasepää, Tähtvere, Rõngu, Kambja, Hindsa, Põrstõ, Võru, Mõntu, Sääre, Salme, Puhja, Kihelkonna, Kalda, Ala, Kilingi Nõmme, Karksi Nuia, Tõrva, Naapka, Kõpu, Leemeti, Lemmetsa, Särevere, Türi, Paide, Koigi, Anna, Märjandi, Kuusalu, Sikassaare, Kärdu and Kaali

FEATURES:
expanded Kiel, Travemünde, Rostock, Bremerhaven, Bremen, Hamburg, Soltau, Uelzen, Winsen, Burg auf Fehmarn, Gusev, Kaliningrad, Kunda, Tartu, Valka, Pärnu, Rakvere and Kuressaare

COMPLETED: various roads and improvements
INCOMPLETE: nothing reported
DEPENDENCY: ProMods
SPECIAL THANKS: SCS, ProMods, Terg500, BlazingcreeperX, hi sora, Bozo and reelzandwheelz

Credits: BXP

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD

Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.
